title: status-pipe orchestrator pass metadata
description: Gitignored at .status-pipe/orchestrator.json. Written by the orchestrator at tick wrap; read by the extension for repo-header display, stale-worker threshold, and parking.

staleWorkerMinutes.description: Echoed from config.json so the extension sees the live value. Optional fields accept an explicit null as equivalent to omission.

recheckAfter.description: Safety horizon: a slow discovery tick fires when this elapses, so parking can never strand the loop

parked.description: Declared when nothing is dispatchable and every active item waits on the operator with an empty inbox; cleared on any pass that finds work. The supervisor suspends ticks while set.

maxConcurrent.description: Planner's declared ceiling; the executor caps live workers at this on top of the already-capped item list. Defaults to items.length when omitted.

items.description: Workers the planner stamped this pass for the supervisor to spawn. Each item already has its worktree created and worker.status=running stamped in the ticket file.

key.description: Dispatch identity — the ticket key, or for an epic its tracking-ticket key (one live worker per key)

prompt.description: Fully-formed claude -p argument (e.g. /status-pipe:work-ticket 19), ack note already appended

worktree.description: Worker cwd — the per-item git worktree path

dispatch.description: Planner→executor channel: workers to spawn this pass. The supervisor substitutes prompt/worktree into the worker launch template (the entry with reserved id `worker`). Cleared (null/omitted) on a pass that dispatches nothing.
